temporal_description: A close-up, over-the-shoulder shot focuses on a man in a dimly lit, dark environment. The man, seen from the back and side, has short, dark hair and wears glasses. He is dressed in a light-colored, possibly beige or khaki, corduroy jacket. The lighting is low-key, casting deep shadows and leaving much of the scene in darkness, suggesting a tense or mysterious atmosphere. The background is indistinct and shrouded in blackness. In the top right corner of the frame, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera remains static, maintaining a tight focus on the man's profile as he appears to be looking intently at something or someone just out of frame. The audio consists of a low, ambient, and suspenseful musical score. A deep, resonant, and slightly dissonant drone creates a feeling of unease and anticipation, as if something is about to unfold. The music is slow and atmospheric, building a sense of quiet tension without any sharp, startling sounds. There is no dialogue or narration.
